## NVIDIA+OR+NVDA Google News, from 2026-02-14 to 2026-02-21:

### Meta Builds AI Infrastructure With NVIDIA (source: NVIDIA Newsroom) 

NVIDIA NewsroomMeta Builds AI Infrastructure With NVIDIANVIDIA today announced a multiyear, multigenerational strategic partnership with Meta spanning on-premises, cloud and AI infrastructure..3 days ago
